techcrunch.title: Jensen Huang says he’s found a ‘brand new’ $200B market for Nvidia
techcrunch.summary: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic says it’s about to have its first profitable quarter
techcrunch.summary: Anthropic has told its investors that it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in its second quarter.

techcrunch.title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
techcrunch.summary: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

techcrunch.title: xAI burned $6.4B last year — SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
techcrunch.summary: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

techcrunch.title: Nvidia posts another record quarter, reveals $43B of holdings in startups
techcrunch.summary: Nvidia announced another record revenue figure after market close on Wednesday, but forecasted that revenue growth would slow in the following quarter.

techcrunch.title: Musk’s xAI is being sued over its data center generators — now it’s buying $2.8B more
techcrunch.summary: Elon Musk's xAI said it will buy $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over the next three years, according to SpaceX's IPO filing.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic will pay xAI $1.25B per month for compute
techcrunch.summary: Elon Musk's xAI surprised the AI world when it made a deal to sell compute to Anthropic. Now we know how much it's worth.

techcrunch.title: OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time
techcrunch.summary: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946 — and this time, the mathematicians who exposed its last embarrassing claim are backing it up.

techcrunch.title: IrisGo, a startup backed by Andrew Ng, looks to become the AI desktop buddy you never knew you needed
techcrunch.summary: Initially billed as an "AI butler," Iris watches what happens on a user's desktop and automatically learns how to do tasks for them, its co-founder says.

techcrunch.title: OpenAI barrels toward IPO that may happen in September
techcrunch.summary: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership, and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.
